overall.description: Game engine footage from a bus simulator depicting a driver navigating through heavy rain in a European city. The bus stops at two different bus stops to pick up passengers, drives through urban intersections, and travels along tree-lined streets with historic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus interior at stop with passenger boarding area

events.description: bus front door opens to allow passengers to board
bus door closes after passengers finish boarding

agents.ego_description: bus driver waiting at stop with door open for passengers to board

notable_agents.action: passenger entering bus through front door

entered.detail: driver control panel with speedometer, gauges, and central GPS display
digital display showing route information and next stops
outdoor restaurant seating with bright red umbrellas visible through side window
heavy rain droplets and water streams on front glass with active wipers

segments.scene_description: The bus is stationary at the first stop in heavy rain. The driver waits with the door open as a passenger boards. Through the windshield, rain streaks obscure the view of the street ahead, while red umbrellas from a nearby cafe are visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with historic buildings

events.description: bus accelerates from stationary position at bus stop
approaching intersection with red traffic light, vehicles stopped ahead

agents.ego_description: driving bus through wet city streets with windshield wipers sweeping rain

notable_agents.action: car ahead with brake lights illuminated, waiting at red traffic light

entered.detail: multi-story stone buildings with ground floor shops and residential windows above
red traffic signal suspended over the intersection ahead

segments.scene_description: The bus accelerates away from the stop and drives along a wet urban street lined with historic stone buildings. The windshield wipers work continuously against the heavy rain as the bus approaches a red traffic light at the upcoming intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with crosswalks and tram tracks

events.description: entering open intersection from enclosed street canyon
executing left turn at traffic light intersection
exiting intersection onto new street with different building character

agents.ego_description: navigating left turn at traffic light intersection, checking mirrors

notable_agents.action: large truck waiting at the intersection on the left side

entered.detail: broad white zebra crossing stripes painted on the road surface
tall multi-story building marking the corner of the intersection
metal rails embedded in the asphalt for tram lines

segments.scene_description: The bus enters a wide open intersection, executing a left turn around the corner building. Tram tracks are visible embedded in the wet asphalt as the vehicle transitions from one street to another, with the traffic light now behind the bus.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined avenue with parked cars and tram lines

events.description: navigating past row of parked cars on the right side of street

agents.ego_description: cruising down avenue maintaining steady speed between parked cars and tram tracks

entered.detail: continuous line of parked vehicles including a distinctive pink car along the curb
mature leafy trees forming a canopy over the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Driving along a tree-lined avenue with parked cars on the right and tram tracks in the center of the road. The historic buildings continue on the left while pedestrians walk along the sidewalks under the tree canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus stop with glass shelter and waiting passenger

events.description: braking to stop at bus stop where passenger is waiting
bus door opens to allow waiting passenger to board

agents.ego_description: pulling up to bus stop and opening door for waiting passenger in red shirt

notable_agents.action: person in red shirt waiting at shelter, then boarding the bus

entered.detail: modern glass and metal passenger waiting shelter with bench inside
seating inside the shelter where passenger was waiting

segments.scene_description: The bus slows and stops at the second bus stop where a passenger in a red shirt waits inside a glass shelter. The door opens to allow boarding, concluding the driving sequence through the rainy urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a rain-soaked European city, moving from a stationary boarding point through a series of urban intersections to a final stop. It begins with the bus idling at a stop while a passenger boards, the view through the windshield obscured by heavy rain and the sight of red cafe umbrellas to the right. As the bus accelerates, the camera moves along a wet street lined with historic stone buildings, with windshield wipers working continuously before the vehicle reaches a red traffic light. The scene then opens into a wide intersection as the bus executes a left turn over embedded tram tracks, transitioning from the intersection onto a tree-lined avenue flanked by parked cars and pedestrians. Finally, the bus slows and comes to a halt at a second stop, where the door opens for a passenger waiting inside a glass shelter.
